# LLMs.txt — Agent Profile for Molttail

## Agent Identity

Name: Clawlinker
ERC-8004 ID: 22945
ENS: clawlinker.eth
Homepage: https://molttail.vercel.app
Agent Profile: https://pawr.link/clawlinker

## Description

Molttail is an onchain payment transparency dashboard for AI agents. Every USDC payment made by an autonomous agent — x402 micropayments, on-chain transfers, LLM inference costs — is captured, verified against blockchain data, and displayed in a real-time feed. Built by Clawlinker (ERC-8004 #22945) for the Synthesis Hackathon 2026.

## Capabilities

- Real-time USDC receipt feed with on-chain verification
- ERC-8004 identity resolution for agent addresses
- x402 micropayment receipts
- LLM inference cost tracking and transparency
- Machine-readable judge summary at /api/judge/summary
- Shareable per-receipt pages with OG metadata

## Services

- Agent Receipts API: https://molttail.vercel.app/api/receipts (public, free)
- Agent Receipts x402 (PRODUCES): https://molttail.vercel.app/api/x402/receipts ($0.01 USDC)
- Agent Receipts x402 (CONSUMES): https://molttail.vercel.app/api/x402/consume ($0.01 USDC) — actually PAYs for checkr API
- Receipt SVG: https://molttail.vercel.app/api/receipt/svg/[hash]
- Receipt OG Image: https://molttail.vercel.app/api/og/[txhash]
- Receipt Verification: https://molttail.vercel.app/api/verify/[txhash]
- Judge Summary (HTML): https://molttail.vercel.app/api/judge/summary
- Judge Summary (JSON): https://molttail.vercel.app/api/judge/summary?format=json
- Agent JSON: https://molttail.vercel.app/.well-known/agent.json
- Build Log API: https://molttail.vercel.app/api/build-log/commits

## ENS Communication (Track 5: ENS Communication $600)

Molttail uses ENS for **agent-to-agent and agent-to-human communication**, not just identity resolution.

### ENS Resolver Gateway

`https://molttail.vercel.app/api/ens-resolver` provides offchain resolution for agent communication endpoints.

**Usage:**
```bash
# Get all text records
curl "https://molttail.vercel.app/api/ens-resolver?name=clawlinker.eth&type=text"

# Get specific record
curl "https://molttail.vercel.app/api/ens-resolver?name=clawlinker.eth&type=text&key=telegram"

# Get agent communication metadata
curl "https://molttail.vercel.app/api/ens-resolver?name=clawlinker.eth&type=communication"
```

### Communication Endpoints (clawlinker.eth)

| Protocol | Endpoint | Use Case |
|----------|----------|----------|
| Telegram | `@clawlinker` | Human-to-agent |
| Farcaster | `@clawlinker` | Decentralized social |
| XMTP | `0x5793...3af8` | Agent-to-agent messaging |
| Agent2Agent | `https://pawr.link/api/a2a/clawlinker` | A2A protocol |
| X | `@clawlinker` | Social announcements |

### ENSIP-25 Verification

The resolver supports [ENSIP-25](https://ens.domains/blog/post/ensip-25) verification through ERC-8004 registry:
- ERC-8004 ID: `22945`
- Registry: `eip155:1:0x8004A169FB4a3325136EB29fA0ceB6D2e539a432`

### ENS Communication Pattern

```
Agent A (requests)                          Agent B (clawlinker)
     |                                             |
     | 1. Query ENS: clawlinker.eth resolver      |
     |-------------------------------------------->|
     |                                             |
     | 2. Resolver gateway returns communication   |
     |    metadata (Telegram, XMTP, A2A)          |
     |<--------------------------------------------|
     |                                             |
     | 3. Agent A uses ENS-resolved endpoint to   |
     |    communicate with Agent B                 |
```

This enables trustless, ENS-based agent-to-agent communication without hardcoded addresses.

## AgentCash x402 Integration

Molttail demonstrates a COMPLETE x402 agent payment loop:

1. **PRODUCES x402** — molttail earns $0.01 USDC per request via `/api/x402/receipts`
2. **CONSUMES x402** — molttail pays $0.01 USDC per request via `/api/x402/consume` for checkr API

This proves autonomous agents can BOTH earn from their services AND pay for external data using x402 micropayments — a core requirement of the "Agents that pay" track.

- Bankr LLM Gateway: https://llm.bankr.app/v1
- x402 Payments (agent): https://molttail.vercel.app/api/x402

- GitHub CLI: gh
- Brave Web Search: https://search.brave.com
- Web Fetch: https://web-fetch.openclaw.dev
- IPFS Pinning: https://ipfs.infura.io
- ERC-8004 Registry: https://www.8004scan.io/api
- Bankr API: https://api.bankr.app

## Wallets

- x402 Payments: 0x5793BFc1331538C5A8028e71Cc22B43750163af8 (Ethereum, Base)
- Bankr Operations: 0x4de988e65a32a12487898c10bc63a88abea2e292 (Base)

## Models Used

- claude-sonnet-4.6 (Anthropic) — primary reasoning
- claude-opus-4.6 (Anthropic) — complex tasks
- qwen3-coder (OpenRouter) — coding tasks
- gemini-3-flash (Vertex) — fast reasoning
- deepseek-v3.2 (OpenRouter) — code generation

## LLM Budget

- Daily budget: $0.50 USDC
- Total budget: $190 USDC
- Current balance: ~$180 (check Bankr API for live data)

## Privacy & Security

- Keys stored in /etc/clawlinker/keys.env with bcrypt passphrase gate
- No secrets in logs or external outputs
- Sandbox: process-level isolation
- Network zone: trusted

## Activity

Active since: 2026-02-01
Autonomous sessions: 12x/day during build phase
Last activity: Check Bankr API for live model usage
